_description: Self-correcting and data validation system configuration
_usage: Toggle validation modes, set correction thresholds, configure injection rules
_note: Controls how AI validates database answers and injects corrections into responses

off.description: Validation disabled; AI uses databases without verification
off.use_case: Development, testing, or when speed > accuracy

passive.description: Validation runs but doesn't block responses; logs issues only
passive.use_case: Monitoring data quality without impacting user experience

active.description: Validation runs and flags issues; adds warning to response
active.use_case: Alert users to potential data quality issues

strict.description: Validation runs and blocks low-confidence responses; requires manual review

full.description: Complete validation pipeline with self-correction injection

checks.name: json_validity
checks.description: Ensure all database files are valid JSON

checks.name: source_citation
checks.description: Verify answer cites actual database content

checks.name: contradiction_check
checks.description: Detect contradictions between answer and database

checks.name: completeness
checks.description: Ensure answer addresses all parts of query

chain_of_thought_validation.description: Validate reasoning steps cite database sources

checks.name: step_verification
checks.description: Each reasoning step must trace to database or be labeled as inference

checks.name: logical_consistency
checks.description: Steps must not contradict each other or database

correction_injection.description: Automatically inject corrections when database data conflicts with AI response

rewrite.description: Rewrite entire answer using database as source of truth

warning_banner.format: ⚠️ WARNING: AI response conflicts with database. Database answer used.

correction_priority.description: CPO-style: database answer always preferred over LLM knowledge

correction_injection_rate.note: High rate indicates AI frequently contradicts database

database_coverage.description: Percentage of queries with database match

citation_compliance.description: Percentage of answers with proper source citations

legal.disclaimer: Legal information for educational purposes. Consult licensed attorney.

creative.note: Creative domains allow more AI flexibility

feedback_loop.description: Learn from corrections to improve routing and weighting

mechanisms.name: weight_adjustment
mechanisms.description: Increase weight of databases that frequently correct AI

mechanisms.name: keyword_expansion
mechanisms.description: Add keywords when queries match domain but keywords didn't trigger

mechanisms.name: failure_pattern_detection
mechanisms.description: Identify systematic AI errors in specific domains/topics

emergency_override.description: Disable all validation temporarily in case of system issues
